step_rationale: ACE drives angiotensin-II production; endothelial dysfunction and inflammation via renin–angiotensin system.
mechanism: ACE generates angiotensin II, promoting endothelial dysfunction, vascular inflammation, and pro-thrombotic state in coronary atherosclerosis.
